body_text:
20:37 â October 2, 2020
Update to Reporting Requirements for CEBA Repayments
EDC requires that repayments on CEBA loans are reported to Central 1 and submitted to EDC twice a month as follows:
Customer Makes Payment to Financial Institution
Financial Institution Reports Payments to Central 1
Between the 1st and the 15th of the month
By the 22nd day of that month
Between the 16th and the last day of the month
By the 7th day of the following month
Central 1 will debit your financial institutionâs current account for the reported amounts on the 8th and the 23rd day each month and submit the funds to EDC on the same day.
We updated these reporting requirements as described in the table below.
